parameters.query:
SELECT 
  l.id AS lead_id,
  l.contact_id,
  l.source,
  l.status,
  l.utm_source,
  l.utm_campaign,
  l.created_at,
  c.name AS contact_name,
  c.phone AS contact_phone,
  c.email AS contact_email
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id = c.id
WHERE l.status = 'received'
ORDER BY l.created_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  l.id AS lead_id,
  l.contact_id,
  l.source,
  l.status,
  l.utm_source,
  l.utm_campaign,
  l.created_at AS lead_created_at,
  c.name AS contact_name,
  c.phone AS contact_phone,
  c.email AS contact_email,
  m.content AS message_content,
  m.channel AS message_channel,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m2 WHERE m2.lead_id = l.id) AS message_count
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN messages m ON l.id = m.lead_id AND m.direction = 'inbound'
WHERE l.id = '{{ $json.lead_id }}'
GROUP BY l.id, l.contact_id, l.source, l.status, l.utm_source, l.utm_campaign, l.created_at, c.name, c.phone, c.email, m.content, m.channel
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO qualifications (
    lead_id,
    lead_type,
    interest,
    priority,
    category,
    summary,
    confidence,
    suggested_action,
    reasoning,
    ai_model,
    processing_ms,
    processed_at
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
    '{{ $json.lead_type }}',
    '{{ $json.interest }}',
    '{{ $json.priority }}',
    {{ $json.category ? "'" + $json.category.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.summary ? "'" + $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.confidence }},
    '{{ $json.suggested_action }}',
    {{ $json.reasoning ? "'" + $json.reasoning.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    '{{ $json.ai_model }}',
    {{ $json.processing_ms }},
    NOW()
)
RETURNING id, lead_id, lead_type, confidence, processed_at;

UPDATE leads
SET status = 'qualified',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.lead_id }}'
RETURNING id, status, updated_at;

INSERT INTO logs (
    lead_id,
    event_type,
    event_data,
    status
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
    '{{ $json.event_type }}',
    '{{ $json.event_data }}',
    '{{ $json.status }}'
)
RETURNING id, lead_id, event_type, created_at;
